transcript.text: Hello, video living in Boulder V-LOG, the 20th of November 2013.

It would get to like 50%, 20%, 9% and then just not upload anymore.
And I had tried to upload a video like 10 times, the Caesars video,
And then the one that I uploaded a couple of days ago, that one took like 10 attempts.
It's just always dropping the upload.
Or it won't even start the upload at all.
It'll just stay at zero forever.
My computer won't even open Google browser at all.
It won't work there at all.
I can't go to Google Plus page at all.
And I can't respond to comments either.
Because it wants me to deactivate, on Windows Explorer it wants me to deactivate
Compatibility view for Explorer, but it's already deactivated.
So I activate it, it won't work when I activate it, and then it won't work when I activate it,
And then I deactivate it.
And I can't download Firefox.
My Norton won't let me.
I guess I'll have to turn off the firewall for that.
I haven't tried that yet.
But anyways, on Friday my mom's going to come back and bring me a new computer,
Or my brother's old computer, and I'll just start uploading videos with that.
I'm sure that thing's not as fucked like this piece of shit.
So anyways, that's why.
But I'll continue to try to make videos and upload them with this piece of shit.
And then I'm never going to get an HP, unless I absolutely have to.
But yeah, next one, or a Windows.
I'm getting a Mac, man.
My brother swears by Macs.
My other brother just got a Mac, and then my mom's going to get a Mac.
Oh, so she said in a little while, once she transfers, I'll get her old computer too.
So then I'll have three computers.
That'll be badass.
Anyways, so what did I do yesterday?

And my roommate got me a beer.
Like, yes, today I worked and I just got back from work, and now I got my new phone.
And then I'm going to bring that in and have them configure it and sell my old phone back and get that all set up.
So that's cool.
And then cancel my old phone server.
And then probably go ahead and ride my bike on the trainers a little bit while I work on my Kindle e-book page.
And then go in the gym, maybe.
That's what I'll do.
I'm not going to work anymore this week because it's going to be freezing.
So I don't know what I'll do.
I haven't decided yet.

But I got a new credit card because I got a new bank.

Peace out.
